articles.title: Infections May Help Fuel Frailty, With a Potential Push From Obesity
articles.description:
(MedPage Today) -- Infections were linked to a significantly greater risk of frailty in older people, and obesity may help shape that relationship, according to an observational cohort study.

articles.title: STAT+: Omada reports first profitable quarter as it seizes broad GLP-1 opportunity
articles.description: Virtual chronic care company Omada, which went public less than a year ago, reported a quarterly profit for the first time.

articles.title: GLP-1 Drugs May Prevent, Treat Multiple Addictions
articles.description:
(MedPage Today) -- Initiation of a GLP-1 receptor agonist was tied to lower risks of several substance use disorders (SUDs) in adults with type 2 diabetes, according to a target trial emulation using data on veterans.

articles.title: Robotic Hip Arthroplasty: Infection Risk Skyrockets in Morbid Obesity
articles.description:
(MedPage Today) -- NEW ORLEANS  --  Patients with morbid obesity undergoing robotically assisted hip replacement faced a dramatically increased likelihood of prosthetic joint infections (PJIs), a researcher said here.

articles.description: GLP-1s and addiction, a gene therapy company and a mining corporation, and more biotech news from The Readout

articles.title: STAT+: Eli Lilly launches program for employers to subsidize cost of obesity drug outside insurance
articles.description: Eli Lilly is going beyond its efforts to sell its obesity drug Zepbound directly to patients, and is now trying to target employers.

articles.title: Opinion: Obesity drugs may silence the ‘drug noise’ behind all addiction
articles.description: A new study found GLP-1 drugs were associated with 50% fewer substance-related deaths, 39% fewer drug overdoses, and 26% fewer drug-related hospitalizations.

articles.title: <![CDATA[Elinzanetant: Advancing Treatment for Vasomotor Symptoms]]>
articles.description: <![CDATA[FDA-approved elinzanetant offers stronger nonhormonal relief for menopausal vasomotor symptoms, with promising trial results and simpler liver monitoring.]]>
